system.flavor: You summon a stiff and hungry hob of deep winter, ruthless and gnarled with age.
system.effect:
Effect an ice hob in range 1-3.

Ice Hob
Summon (3)
Summon effect of these hobs links to a foe in range 1-2 when summoned. If that foe ends their turn 2 or more spaces away from the hob, dismiss the hob and they must save. They take 2 piercing damage and have difficult terrain created under them. On a failed save, they additionally become immobile until the end of their next turn, or until they take damage again.
